name: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W212/S212, C207/A207 (5.5L V8 petrol)

serviceNotes.engine oil: M273 5.5L V8: Mercedes EU plans commonly 15,000 km or 12 months; rec 10,000 km severe use.
serviceNotes.dust filter: Dust filter per Mercedes EU maintenance booklet.
serviceNotes.engine air filter: Updated to 15,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (W212 petrol Tier 2 proxy; https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7614-2009/service has no E 500 table).
serviceNotes.spark plugs: 50,000 km / 48 months — Mercedes-Benz W212 M273 V8 service manual maintenance table (no Tier 2 auto-abc row for E 500 W212).
serviceNotes.poly-V belt: 120,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (W212 petrol Tier 2 serpentine belt proxy).
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: Address if idle or performance issues suggest carbon buildup.

serviceSources.engine oil: https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service — 15,000 km / 12 months (W212 2.0 petrol Tier 2 proxy for fixed Oil Service class on W212 petrol chassis)
serviceSources.dust filter: Cabin dust filter 30,000 km / 24 months — Mercedes-Benz W212; https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service
serviceSources.engine air filter: Changed from 60,000 km / 48 months to 15,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (Tier 2 W212 petrol row; https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7614-2009/service has no data for E 500 5.5)
serviceSources.brake fluid: Brake fluid renewal every 24 months (time-based, DOT 4+); Mercedes-Benz passenger-car service manual — W212
serviceSources.check brake pad thickness: Brake pad thickness check ~30,000 km — Mercedes-Benz W212 inspection schedule (wear item; interval approximate)
serviceSources.spark plugs: 50,000 km / 48 months — Mercedes-Benz W212 M273 V8 service manual maintenance table
serviceSources.coolant: 150,000 km / 60 months: Mercedes long-life coolant for W212 V8 petrol (https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7614-2009/service has no coolant row)
serviceSources.transfer case oil: 4MATIC transfer case oil ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.front axle differential oil: 4MATIC front axle differential ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.rear axle differential oil: Rear differential oil ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.intake carbon clean: Intake tract cleaning ~120,000 km when symptoms warrant — specialist practice
